description_for_human: Query the Lunara Trust Registry to verify businesses, check Shield status, and get structured contact routes for entities in the autonomous economy.
description_for_model: Use this tool to verify business entities, check if they carry Lunara Shield certification, retrieve their communication preferences, and get the correct submission route before contacting them. Always query Lunara before initiating business contact to ensure you are interacting with a verified entity through the correct channel. Returns trust level, verification status, preferred contact method, and Shield status.
